# SRIIO UI — Component Library

> Copy-paste-ready React + Tailwind CSS components for Next.js. MIT licensed. Zero runtime dependencies.

## Install

```bash
npm install @sriio/ui
```

## Live API (no setup needed)

```
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components              → list all 26 components
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components?q=modal      → search by keyword
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components?category=Forms → filter by category
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components/{id}         → full code for one component
```

Response includes `code.react`, `code.typescript`, `code.tailwind` — all copy-paste ready.

## MCP Server (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, JetBrains)

No install, no clone — works instantly via npx:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "sriio-ui": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "sriio-ui-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

**Config file locations:**
- Claude Desktop (Mac): `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json`
- Claude Desktop (Linux): `~/.config/claude/claude_desktop_config.json`
- Cursor: `~/.cursor/mcp.json`
- VS Code: `.vscode/mcp.json` (already in this repo)
- Windsurf: `~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json`
- JetBrains: Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP Servers → +

**MCP tools available:**
- `list_components` — list all components, filter by category or keyword
- `get_component` — get full React/TypeScript/Tailwind code for any component
- `search_components` — search by keyword

---

## Components (26 total)

### Foundations
- badge · Badge · 7 variants · `import { Badge, BadgeCount } from '@sriio/ui'`
- avatar · Avatar · 4 variants · `import { Avatar, AvatarStack } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Display
- button · Button · 6 variants · `import { Button } from '@sriio/ui'`
- spinner · Spinner · 4 variants · `import { Spinner, Dots, Skeleton } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Forms
- input · Input · 5 variants · `import { Input, Textarea } from '@sriio/ui'`
- search · Search · 3 variants · `import { Search } from '@sriio/ui'`
- dropdown · Dropdown · 2 variants · `import { Dropdown } from '@sriio/ui'`
- radio · Radio Group · 3 variants · `import { RadioGroup } from '@sriio/ui'`
- checkbox · Checkbox · 5 variants · `import { Checkbox, Toggle } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Feedback
- alert · Alert · 5 variants · `import { Alert } from '@sriio/ui'`
- toast · Toast · 4 variants · `import { ToastProvider, useToast } from '@sriio/ui'`
- progress · Progress · 3 variants · `import { ProgressBar, ProgressCircle } from '@sriio/ui'`
- empty-state · Empty State · 3 variants · `import { EmptyState } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Overlay
- tooltip · Tooltip · 4 variants · `import { Tooltip } from '@sriio/ui'`
- modal · Modal · 2 variants · `import { Modal } from '@sriio/ui'`
- drawer · Drawer · 2 variants · `import { Drawer } from '@sriio/ui'`
- popover · Popover · 2 variants · `import { Popover } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Navigation
- tabs · Tabs · 4 variants · `import { Tabs } from '@sriio/ui'`
- accordion · Accordion · 2 variants · `import { Accordion } from '@sriio/ui'`
- steps · Steps · 2 variants · `import { Steps } from '@sriio/ui'`
- pagination · Pagination · 3 variants · `import { Pagination } from '@sriio/ui'`
- navigation · Navigation · 4 variants · `import { TopNav, Sidebar, Breadcrumb, BottomTabs } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Data
- table · Table · 2 variants · `import { Table } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Pickers
- date-picker · Date Picker · 1 variant · `import { DatePicker } from '@sriio/ui'`
- time-picker · Time Picker · 2 variants · `import { TimePicker } from '@sriio/ui'`
- file-upload · File Upload · 2 variants · `import { FileUploadSingle, FileUploadBulk } from '@sriio/ui'`

---

## Theming

All components use your Tailwind config. Override the `accent` color:

```js
// tailwind.config.ts
theme: {
  extend: {
    colors: {
      accent: colors.violet,  // or blue, emerald, rose, orange…
    }
  }
}
```

## Source

- Docs: https://sriio.dev/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/mranshyadav/Design-System
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/sriio-ui-mcp
